let Selector = require('../selector') class PlaceholderShown extends Selector { /** * Return different selectors depend on prefix */ prefixed(prefix) { if (prefix === '-moz-') { return ':-moz-placeholder' } else if (prefix === '-ms-') { return ':-ms-input-placeholder' } return `:${prefix}placeholder-shown` } } PlaceholderShown.names = [':placeholder-shown'] module.exports = PlaceholderShown
